name: rds
description: Research Discussion System: structured local research discussions, context persistence, and Obsidian-compatible navigation.

interface.shortDescription: Turn AI research discussions into durable Markdown records.
interface.longDescription: RDS sets up local research project folders with structured context, discussion logs, literature notes, metadata, and provider-neutral agent instructions.
defaultPrompt: Use RDS to set up this research project.
Use RDS to resume the research context in this folder.
Use RDS to save this discussion as a durable research log.
